title: Adimaly landslide survivors press for rehabilitation package; shift protest to panchayat office amid fresh mudslide threat
summary: Seventeen families displaced by an October 2025 landslide have moved their protest to Adimaly Panchayat office after heavy rain at the original site. They demand compensation for their high-risk homes.

title: Child rights panel intervenes in Pathanamthitta minor sexual assault case, seeks police report
summary: A 13-year-old girl alleging sexual assault by six individuals has prompted the Kerala Commission for Protection of Child Rights to seek reports from local authorities.

title: Kerala Police warn businesses of new WhatsApp-based cyber fraud
summary: Kerala Police warn businesses of a WhatsApp scam where fraudsters use hacked accounts, sending malicious files disguised as statements to steal data and trick staff into transferring funds.

title: 'Seasoned burglar masked by clean image, white attire': Wayanad Police nab elderly man in gold theft case
summary: A 67-year-old man, A Muhammed Ali, was arrested for gold theft after his respectable appearance concealed a nearly three-decade criminal record as a habitual burglar.

title: Nursing student drowns in check dam on Idukki farmland
summary: A 20-year-old nursing student drowned after falling into a check dam on his family's farm in Idukki, India. Local residents pulled him out, but he was declared dead at hospital.

title: ഏവരുടെയും ശ്രദ്ധയ്ക്ക്! വാട്‌സ്ആപ്പിൽ വരുന്ന 'ഈ' ഫയൽ തുറന്നാൽ അക്കൗണ്ടിലെ പണം മുഴുവൻ പോകും
summary: Cybercriminals are targeting accounts departments in Kerala businesses using malicious WhatsApp files disguised as account statements. Learn how to stay safe. കേരളത്തിലെ ബിസിനസ് സ്ഥാപനങ്ങളെയും സാമ്പത്തിക വിഭാഗങ്ങളെയും...

title: Operation Toofan nets 30 kg cannabis; history-sheeter among two arrested in Kasaragod
summary: Police seized 30kg of cannabis and arrested two men, including a history-sheeter, in Kasaragod during Operation Thoofan, a state anti-narcotics drive.

title: Forest official suspended over delay in paying sandalwood owner
summary: A Deputy Range Forest Officer in Kerala has been suspended pending inquiry due to alleged delays in paying a landowner for sandalwood trees seized from his private property.

title: Kasaragod police arrest 2 cattle thieves from Mangaluru; hunt on for gang leader, 2 others
summary: Two men were arrested in Mangaluru for cow theft, with police seeking three others in a gang targeting stray cattle across districts.

title: Malayidom Thuruth row: Rehabilitation of Dalit families gathers pace as govt prepares to hand over land sketch
summary: Seven Dalit families facing eviction received survey sketches and layout plans for their new homes. This marks a significant step in their rehabilitation process after a tense standoff and legal battles.

title: New solar boat all set to boost backwater tourism in Kottayam
summary: The Muhamma–Kannanankara–Cheepunkal–Maniyaparamu route has been chosen by the Water Transport Department as its inaugural sightseeing path for Kumarakom.

title: ഒരു മാസത്തിൽ സ്വർണ്ണത്തിന് 8,000 രൂപ കുറഞ്ഞു! ഇനിയും കുറയുമോ? വാങ്ങാൻ പറ്റിയ സമയം ഇതാണോ?
summary: Gold prices fell by 5.65% and silver dropped over 10% on MCX in the past month. Experts suggest a staggered buying strategy or SIPs for long-term investors.
